fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection logic on line 63 is incorrect. It uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`) which allows adjacent/touching time windows, but the requirements imply that touching windows should be considered an overlap and be rejected.

spec.expr: any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline) == any(not (b__1 < s or a__1 > e) for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The result of the buggy overlap check should match the result of a correct check that rejects touching intervals.

spec.expr: not any(b__1 == s or a__1 == e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If the code determines there is no overlap, there should also be no touching windows.

spec.expr: all(result__1[i][1] < result__1[i+1][0] for i in range(len(result__1)-1))

constraints.intent: The updated timeline must not contain any overlapping or touching slots.

spec.expr: not any(window[1] == s or window[0] == e for s, e in timeline) or (__cbfl_result[0] is False)

constraints.intent: If the new window touches an existing one, the operation must fail.
